message:
feat: Implement more TODO stubs with real functionality

fileobject.zig:
- PyFile_FromFd: Full implementation calling _io.open with fd, mode,
  encoding, errors, newline conversion to Python objects

descrobject.zig:
- PyDescr_NewMethod: Set vectorcall based on ml_flags (METH_NOARGS,
  METH_O, METH_VARARGS)
- vectorcall_noargs: Call method with self only
- vectorcall_o: Call method with self + single arg
- vectorcall_varargs: Build tuple from args, call method

Reduces TODO count from 10 to 8 (2 eliminated).
